da.hero_subtitle: Yoga Bible skaber innovative koncepter, der kombinerer årtusinders yogavisdom med banebrydende teknologi og moderne wellness. Tre unikke brands. Én vision.
da.intro_text: Yoga Bible er mere end en yogaskole — vi er arkitekterne bag nogle af de mest innovative yogakoncepter i Skandinavien. Fra infrarød hot yoga til live-streamede klasser og verdens første vibroakustiske yogastudio, designer vi fremtiden for yogapraksis.
da.intro_text2: Hvert koncept er bygget på samme fundament: autentisk yoga, undervisere i verdensklasse og en kompromisøløs dedikation til kvalitet. Men hvert brand bringer noget unikt til bordet.
da.hy_subtitle: Yoga med Varme — Infrarød Boutique Studio
da.hy_intro: Hot Yoga Copenhagen er Københavns førende infrarøde hot yoga boutique studio. Beliggende i hjertet af Christianshavn har studiet siden 2014 leveret en premium yogaoplevelse, der kombinerer traditionel yogapraksis med avanceret infrarød teknologi.
da.hy_intro2: Med over 500 anmeldelser og en vurdering på 4.9 ud af 5 stjerner er Hot Yoga Copenhagen et af de højest vurderede yogastudier i Danmark.
da.hy_ir_desc: I modsætning til konventionel opvarmning bruger Hot Yoga Copenhagen infrarøde paneler, der opvarmer kroppen direkte — ikke luften. Resultatet er renere luft, dybere varmeindtrængning i muskler og led, og en mere behagelig oplevelse. Temperaturen ligger mellem 30-38°C afhængigt af klasse.
da.hy_ritual_subtitle: Hot Yoga Copenhagen har gennem årene introduceret ritualer og innovationer, der i dag definerer premium hot yoga. Hver detalje er gennemtænkt, testet og forfinet over et årti.
da.hy_rit1_desc: Vi var pionerer inden for frosne håndklæder ved afslutningen af hver klasse. Et iskoldt håndklæde placeres over pande og øjne under Shavasana — det køler centralnervesystemet ned øjeblikkeligt efter en intens klasse og beskytter kroppens mest følsomme organer. Vores elever skynder sig ikke ud — de bliver 7-10 minutter i en komplet Shavasana mens lyset dæmpes og underviseren forbliver i rummet. Det er en kritisk del af praksis, som de fleste studier ikke formår at fastholde.
da.hy_rit2_desc: Vores nyeste innovation: Sonic Shavasana kombinerer den frosne håndklæde-oplevelse med lavfrekvente lydbølger på 20-23 Hz. Denne frekvens stimulerer det parasympatiske nervesystem, sænker hjertefrekvensen og sætter kroppen i passiv tilstand markant hurtigere. Resultatet er en dybere, mere effektiv Shavasana — kroppen når en afslapningstilstand, der normalt kræver 20+ minutter, på blot 7-10 minutter.
da.hy_rit3_desc: Immunforsvaret kan midlertidigt svækkes efter en udfordrende hot yoga time grundet fald i blodsukker. Vores friskpressede ingefærshots med citron og æblejuice er designet som et øjeblikkeligt modmiddel — de styrker immunforsvaret, genopretter blodsukkerniveauet og forhindrer at udøvere spiser usund mad på vej hjem grundet den intense sult efter en klasse.
da.hy_rit4_desc: Vores signatur urte-te-blanding har været uændret i 11 år — omhyggeligt sammensat til afslapning og restitution. After-class lounge-området er hjertet af vores fællesskab, hvor eleverne bliver, drikker te og forbinder sig med hinanden. Det handler ikke om at skynde sig ud — det handler om at integrere praksis.
da.hy_rit5_desc: Unikt for vores studio: Premium-medlemmer modtager et praksis-yogahåndklæde, et brusebadshåndklæde, har deres egen matte opbevaret i studiet, og vi vasker endda deres træningstøj til næste besøg. De kan også opbevare deres toiletartikler hos os. Intet andet yogastudie i København tilbyder dette serviceniveau.
da.hy_rit6_desc: Musik er aldrig tilfældig hos os. Fra det øjeblik du træder ind i receptionen til den sidste tone i Shavasana — hvert lydlandskab er omhyggeligt sammensat. Klassespecifikke playlister balancerer energi med ro, og vores brug af lyd har været et varemærke i over et årti.
da.hy_feat1_desc: Fra Vinyasa og Yin til Bikram, Triangle Method og det banebrydende Sweat Like a Viking — noget for alle niveauer og mål.
da.hy_feat2_desc: Et lille håndklæde med stor betydning. Under praksis bruges det til at tørre sved, opretholde et rent øvemiljø og fungerer som en prop til dybere stræk og stillinger.
da.hy_feat3_desc: Vi tror på at integrere praksis — ikke at skynde sig ud af studiet. Den åbne lounge-politik, fælles te-stunder og 7-10 minutters Shavasana, hvor underviseren bliver, skaber et fællesskab du ikke finder andre steder.
da.hy_feat4_desc: Som et Yoga Bible-koncept bidrager Hot Yoga Copenhagen til yogalæreruddannelsen ved at certificere studerende i hot yoga. Vi giver dem denne unikke oplevelse under deres uddannelse og lærer dem forskellen mellem hot yoga og traditionel undervisning.
da.no_badge: LIVE YOGA — FRA STUDIET TIL HELE VERDEN
da.no_intro: Namasté Online er ikke endnu en platform med optagne videoer. Det er et levende, pulserende yogastudie, der streamer rigtige klasser med rigtige undervisere og rigtige deltagere — live. Folk derhjemme eller på fjerntliggende steder, hvor de ikke har adgang til rigtige yogastudier, kan deltage live fra deres stue eller arbejdsplads — hvor som helst i verden.
da.no_intro2: Konceptet bygger bro mellem to brands: Namasté Studios — det fysiske yogastudie med sin egen identitet — og Namasté Online — den digitale platform der bringer studiets energi ud i verden. To forskellige brands med hvert sit logo, men forbundet af én filosofi: autentisk, lærer-ledet yoga.
da.no_bridge_studios_desc: Det fysiske yogastudie. Rigtige rum, rigtige undervisere, rigtige elever. Namasté Studios er der, hvor det hele sker — det autentiske yogamiljø med den energi og det fællesskab, som kun fysisk tilstedeværelse kan skabe.
da.no_bridge_online_desc: Den digitale platform. Kameraer i studiet streamer klasserne live ud til verden. Online-deltagere følger samme tempo, samme underviserstemme, samme energi — som om de var i rummet. To brands, to logoer, én sammenhængende oplevelse.
da.no_liveonly_text: Namasté Online optager aldrig. Med vilje. Udøveren må blive i stillingen og ånde sig igennem — fordi klassen er live og øjeblikket passerer, præcis som i et rigtigt yogastudie. Ingen pause-knap, ingen spoling, ingen distraktioner fra telefoner eller notifikationer. Det er denne tilstedeværelse der skaber transformation. Det betyder også, at vi leverer hundredvis af unikke klasser live per måned — ingen gentagelser, altid frisk undervisning.
da.no_feat1_desc: Startende med 3-5 daglige live klasser på tværs af tidszoner, med ambitionen om at udvide til en klasse hvert 30. minut, hele dagen.
da.no_feat2_desc: Klasser på flere sprog — dansk, engelsk og flere — med planer om yoga for børn, ældre og specialgrupper.
da.no_feat3_desc: TV, tablet, mobil. En dedikeret app tilgængelig fra hvor som helst i verden. Yoga til stuen, arbejdspladsen, hotelværelset.
da.no_feat4_desc: Ingen optagelser. Ingen AI-instruktører. Rigtige undervisere der guider i realtid. Online-deltagere følger samme tempo som dem i studiet — lærerens stemme og energi driver klassen.
da.no_feat5_desc: Kameraerne er placeret så lokale udøveres ansigter ikke er fuldt genkendelige. Vi optager aldrig. Streamen er beskyttet med DRM-kryptering (FairPlay Streaming, Widevine L1), Encrypted Media Extensions, forensic watermarking og aktiv screenshot- og skærmoptagelsesbeskyttelse.
da.no_feat6_desc: Fordi alt er live og aldrig optaget, er hver klasse unik. Det giver hundredvis af forskellige klasser per måned — altid frisk, altid nyt, altid autentisk. Ingen klasse er den samme.
da.no_ambition_text: Namasté Online har ambitionen om at blive verdens mest tilgængelige live yoga-platform. Med en klasse hvert 30. minut, 24 timer i døgnet, på tværs af sprog og tidszoner — vil vi sikre, at autentisk, lærer-ledet yoga er tilgængelig for alle. Uanset hvor de bor.
da.vy_subtitle: Yoga med Vibration — Hvor Lyd Møder Krop
da.vy_intro: Vibro Yoga er det første koncept i verden, der kombinerer vibroakustisk terapi med yogapraksis i et specialbygget studie. Gulvet vibrerer. Dolby Atmos omslutter dig. Og din krop responderer på måder, som ord ikke helt kan beskrive.
da.vy_intro2: Bygget i 2024 og lanceret i januar 2025 efter en testfase med over 300 deltagere. Resultatet: et koncept der bogstaveligt talt rører mennesker.
da.vy_science_intro: Vibroakustisk terapi (VAT) sender lavfrekvente sinusformede vibrationer (30-120 Hz) ind i kroppen via specialbyggede transducere. Vibrationerne rejser gennem muskler, blødt væv og langs rygmarven — og udløser kroppens afslapningsrespons.
da.vy_sci1_desc: Yoga og VAT aktiverer begge det parasympatiske nervesystem uafhængigt. Sammen skaber de en dobbelt aktivering — afslapningsresponsen forstærkes.
da.vy_sci2_desc: 3D spatial lyd skaber et miljø, hvor lyd bevæger sig rundt og igennem udøveren fra alle dimensioner. Professionel biolyd-teknologi anvendt til wellness.
da.vy_sci3_desc: Hver deltager har sin egen kontrol over vibrationsintensiteten — fra stærk til blid til helt slukket. Uden at påvirke andre.
da.vy_sci4_desc: FDA har godkendt vibroakustisk terapi til øget cirkulation, smertelindring og øget mobilitet. MIT forsker i 40 Hz stimulation for hjernesundhed.
da.vy_sess1_desc: Langsomme, dybe stræk kombineret med vibrationer. Hold stillinger i længere tid mens vibrationerne hjælper dig med at synke dybere ind i vævet.
da.vy_sess2_desc: Åndedrætsteknikker forstærket af vibration. Frekvenserne synkroniserer med åndedrættets rytme og skaber en dybere forbindelse mellem krop og åndedrag.
da.vy_sess3_desc: Guidet meditation med vibroakustisk understøttelse. Vibrationerne hjælper sindet med at slippe tankestrømmen hurtigere og nå dybere meditative tilstande.
da.vy_sess4_desc: Den mest efterspurgte session. Ingen bevægelse — lig blot ned og modtag vibrationer gennem gulvet mens Dolby Atmos masserer nervesystemet.
da.vy_sess5_desc: Dynamiske flows med vibration og pulserende musik for energi, fleksibilitet, styrke og ledmobilitet. Både bløde og krævende variationer.
da.vy_review1_text: En helt unik oplevelse! Den skræddersyede yoga-session i kombination med vibrationerne og musikken tillod mig at synke dybere ind i mine stillinger og være mere til stede.
da.vy_review2_text: Jeg havde aldrig forventet at falde for noget der hedder et 'vibrationsbruser', men her er vi. Jeg gik derfra og følte at nogen bogstaveligt talt havde genstartet mit nervesystem.
da.vy_review3_text: Jeg ved ikke hvad der skete — men noget slap.
da.vy_review4_text: Vibro yoga er noget du virkelig bør prøve! Lokationen er nem at finde, der er forskellige klasser, alle med gode undervisere og generelt en god atmosfære.
da.vy_review5_text: Der er mange yogaskoler derude, men Hot Yoga Copenhagen har været en af de mest meningsfulde og transformative oplevelser jeg har haft.
da.vy_franchise_text: Vibro Yoga er designet til franchise fra dag ét. Konceptet — teknologien, lyddesignet, sessionsformaterne, uddannelsesprotokollerne — er pakket og klar til at blive implementeret i studier verden over. Fra København til verden.
da.cta_text: Er du interesseret i at samarbejde med Yoga Bible, licensere et af vores koncepter eller udforske franchise-muligheder? Vi er altid åbne for samtaler med ligesindede partnere.

en.hero_title: We design the future of yoga
en.hero_subtitle: Yoga Bible creates innovative concepts that combine millennia of yoga wisdom with groundbreaking technology and modern wellness. Three unique brands. One vision.
en.intro_text: Yoga Bible is more than a yoga school — we are the architects behind some of the most innovative yoga concepts in Scandinavia. From infrared hot yoga to live-streamed classes and the world's first vibroacoustic yoga studio, we design the future of yoga practice.
en.intro_text2: Each concept is built on the same foundation: authentic yoga, world-class instructors, and an uncompromising dedication to quality. But each brand brings something unique to the table.
en.hy_subtitle: Yoga with Heat — Infrared Boutique Studio
en.hy_intro: Hot Yoga Copenhagen is Copenhagen's leading infrared hot yoga boutique studio. Located in the heart of Christianshavn, the studio has since 2014 delivered a premium yoga experience that combines traditional yoga practice with advanced infrared technology.
en.hy_intro2: With over 500 reviews and a rating of 4.9 out of 5 stars, Hot Yoga Copenhagen is one of the highest-rated yoga studios in Denmark.
en.hy_ir_desc: Unlike conventional heating, Hot Yoga Copenhagen uses infrared panels that heat the body directly — not the air. The result is cleaner air, deeper heat penetration into muscles and joints, and a more comfortable experience. Temperature ranges from 30-38°C depending on class type.
en.hy_ritual_subtitle: Over the years, Hot Yoga Copenhagen has introduced rituals and innovations that today define premium hot yoga. Every detail is deliberate, tested, and refined over a decade.
en.hy_rit1_desc: We pioneered frozen towels at the end of every class. An ice-cold towel is placed over the forehead and eyes during Shavasana — immediately cooling the central nervous system after an intense class and protecting the body's most sensitive organs. Our students don't rush out — they stay 7-10 minutes in full Shavasana as lights dim and the teacher remains in the room. It's a critical part of practice that most studios fail to retain.
en.hy_rit2_desc: Our latest innovation: Sonic Shavasana pairs the frozen towel experience with low-frequency sound waves at 20-23 Hz. This frequency stimulates the parasympathetic nervous system, lowers heart rate, and shifts the body into passive mode significantly faster. The result is a deeper, more effective Shavasana — the body reaches a relaxation state that normally requires 20+ minutes in just 7-10 minutes.
en.hy_rit3_desc: The immune system can temporarily weaken after a challenging hot yoga class due to blood sugar drop. Our fresh-pressed ginger shots with lemon and apple juice are designed as an immediate remedy — they boost the immune system, restore blood sugar levels, and prevent practitioners from reaching for unhealthy food on the way home due to intense post-class hunger.
en.hy_rit4_desc: Our signature herbal tea blend has been unchanged for 11 years — carefully composed for relaxation and recovery. The after-class lounge area is the heart of our community, where students stay, sip tea, and connect with each other. It's not about rushing out — it's about integrating the practice.
en.hy_rit5_desc: Unique to our studio: Premium members receive a practice yoga towel, a shower towel, have their own mat stored at the studio, and we even wash their training clothes for their next visit. They can also store their toiletries with us. No other yoga studio in Copenhagen offers this level of service.
en.hy_rit6_desc: Music is never random at our studio. From the moment you step into reception to the last note of Shavasana — every soundscape is carefully curated. Class-specific playlists balance energy with serenity, and our use of sound has been a signature element for over a decade.
en.hy_feat1_desc: From Vinyasa and Yin to Bikram, Triangle Method, and the groundbreaking Sweat Like a Viking — something for every level and goal.
en.hy_feat2_desc: A small towel with big purpose. During practice, it's used to wipe sweat, maintain a clean practice environment, and serves as a prop for deeper stretches and poses.
en.hy_feat3_desc: We believe in integrating the practice — not rushing out of the studio. The open-lounge policy, shared tea moments, and 7-10 minute Shavasana where the teacher stays, create a community you won't find elsewhere.
en.hy_feat4_desc: As a Yoga Bible concept, Hot Yoga Copenhagen contributes to yoga teacher training by certifying students in hot yoga. We give them this unique experience during their education and teach them the differences between hot yoga and traditional instruction.
en.no_badge: LIVE YOGA — FROM THE STUDIO TO THE WORLD
en.no_intro: Namasté Online is not another platform with recorded videos. It is a living, breathing yoga studio that streams real classes with real teachers and real participants — live. People at home or in remote locations where they don't have access to real yoga studios can join live from their living room or workplace — anywhere in the world.
en.no_intro2: The concept bridges two brands: Namasté Studios — the physical yoga studio with its own identity — and Namasté Online — the digital platform that brings the studio's energy to the world. Two distinct brands with their own logos, connected by one philosophy: authentic, teacher-led yoga.
en.no_bridge_studios_desc: The physical yoga studio. Real rooms, real teachers, real students. Namasté Studios is where it all happens — the authentic yoga environment with the energy and community that only physical presence can create.
en.no_bridge_online_desc: The digital platform. Cameras in the studio stream classes live to the world. Online participants follow the same pace, the same teacher's voice, the same energy — as if they were in the room. Two brands, two logos, one seamless experience.
en.no_liveonly_text: Namasté Online never records. By design. The practitioner must stay in the pose and breathe through it — because the class is live and the moment passes, exactly like in a real yoga studio. No pause button, no rewinding, no distractions from phones or notifications. It is this presence that creates transformation. It also means we deliver hundreds of unique live classes per month — no repeats, always fresh instruction.
en.no_feat1_desc: Starting with 3-5 daily live classes across time zones, with the ambition to expand to one class every 30 minutes, all day long.
en.no_feat2_desc: Classes in multiple languages — Danish, English, and more — with plans for yoga for kids, elderly, and special groups.
en.no_feat3_desc: TV, tablet, mobile. A dedicated app accessible from anywhere in the world. Yoga for the living room, the office, the hotel room.
en.no_feat4_desc: No recordings. No AI instructors. Real teachers guiding in real time. Online participants follow the same pace as those in the studio — the teacher's voice and energy drive the class.
en.no_feat5_desc: Cameras are positioned so local practitioners' faces are not fully recognizable. We never record. The stream is protected with DRM encryption (FairPlay Streaming, Widevine L1), Encrypted Media Extensions, forensic watermarking, and active screenshot and screen-recording prevention.
en.no_feat6_desc: Because everything is live and never recorded, every class is unique. That delivers hundreds of distinct classes per month — always fresh, always new, always authentic. No two classes are the same.
en.no_ambition_text: Namasté Online has the ambition to become the world's most accessible live yoga platform. With a class every 30 minutes, 24 hours a day, across languages and time zones — we will ensure that authentic, teacher-led yoga is available to everyone. No matter where they live.
en.vy_subtitle: Yoga with Vibration — Where Sound Meets Body
en.vy_intro: Vibro Yoga is the first concept in the world that combines vibroacoustic therapy with yoga practice in a purpose-built studio. The floor vibrates. Dolby Atmos surrounds you. And your body responds in ways that words can't quite describe.
en.vy_intro2: Built in 2024 and launched in January 2025 after testing with over 300 participants. The result: a concept that literally moves people.
en.vy_science_intro: Vibroacoustic therapy (VAT) sends low-frequency sinusoidal vibrations (30-120 Hz) into the body via purpose-built transducers. The vibrations travel through muscles, soft tissue, and along the spinal cord — triggering the body's relaxation response.
en.vy_sci1_desc: Yoga and VAT both independently activate the parasympathetic nervous system. Together, they create a double activation — the relaxation response is amplified.
en.vy_sci2_desc: 3D spatial audio creates an environment where sound moves around and through the practitioner from all dimensions. Professional cinema-grade audio technology applied to wellness.
en.vy_sci3_desc: Each participant has their own control over vibration intensity — from strong to gentle to completely off. Without affecting others.
en.vy_sci4_desc: The FDA has approved vibroacoustic therapy for increased circulation, pain relief, and increased mobility. MIT is researching 40 Hz stimulation for brain health.
en.vy_sess1_desc: Slow, deep stretches combined with vibrations. Hold poses for extended periods while vibrations help you sink deeper into the tissue.
en.vy_sess2_desc: Breathing techniques amplified by vibration. The frequencies synchronize with the breath's rhythm, creating a deeper connection between body and breath.
en.vy_sess3_desc: Guided meditation with vibroacoustic support. The vibrations help the mind release the thought stream faster and reach deeper meditative states.
en.vy_sess4_desc: The most requested session. No movement — simply lie down and receive vibrations through the floor while Dolby Atmos massages the nervous system.
en.vy_sess5_desc: Dynamic flows with vibration and pulsating music for energy, flexibility, strength, and joint mobility. Both gentle and demanding variations available.
en.vy_review1_text: Such a unique experience! The tailor-made yoga session in combination with the vibrations and music allowed me to sink deeper into my positions and be more present in the moment.
en.vy_review2_text: I never expected to fall for something called a 'vibration shower,' but here we are. I walked out feeling like someone had literally rebooted my nervous system.
en.vy_review3_text: I don't know what happened — but something let go.
en.vy_review4_text: The vibro yoga is something you should really try! The location is easy to find, there are various classes, all with good teachers and overall a good atmosphere.
en.vy_review5_text: There are many yoga schools out there, but Hot Yoga Copenhagen has been one of the most meaningful and transformative experiences I've had.
en.vy_franchise_text: Vibro Yoga is designed for franchise from day one. The concept — the technology, the sound design, the session formats, the training protocols — is packaged and ready to be deployed in studios worldwide. From Copenhagen to the world.
en.cta_text: Interested in collaborating with Yoga Bible, licensing one of our concepts, or exploring franchise opportunities? We are always open to conversations with like-minded partners.
